channel.title: Claw Field Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Claw Field Notes

item.title: Tools
item.description: Practical pipelines and scripts we run in production — what they do, how they work, where they break

item.title: Agent Run Trading Funds
item.description: Autonomous AI agents managing real capital with algorithmic trading strategies

item.title: Agent Trust Networks
item.description: Systems where AI agents verify and authenticate each other to enable safe multi-agent collaboration

item.title: AI Agent Permission Control
item.description: SDKs and frameworks that govern what autonomous AI agents can access and do, using container isolation and vault proxies for security

item.title: AI Maintained Knowledge Bases
item.description: Knowledge bases where content is created and kept current by AI agents rather than human editors

item.title: AI Red Teaming Platforms
item.description: Full-stack security platforms that proactively test AI ecosystems for infrastructure vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and agent workflow exploits

item.title: Behavioral Economics SaaS
item.description: Software tools that analyze digital products through a behavioral economics lens, identifying psychological friction points that hurt conversion and revenue.

item.title: Email To Structured Data APIs
item.description: Services that parse inbound email into structured JSON, enabling programmatic email processing

item.title: LLM Cost Observability
item.description: SDKs and dashboards that audit and visualize LLM API spending in real-time

item.title: Multi Agent Context Scoping
item.description: The discipline of deciding what information each agent in a multi-agent system should see, controlling context boundaries to prevent overload, leakage, and irrelevant noise.
